case.description: Combine input lifting, interpretation, invariant checks, obstructions, completions, review workflow, and projections into the first complete reference product scenario. MCP is out of scope.
case.title: Architecture Product end-to-end reference

node.description: Done when a nontrivial architecture input runs through the full HigherGraphen pipeline and emits traceable human, AI, and audit reports.

node.description: Depends on hg_architecture_input_lift, hg_architecture_interpretation_package, hg_completion_review_workflow, hg_projection_views_and_loss, and hg_casegraphen_tool_foundation. MCP is explicitly out of scope for this case set because the user selected CLI plus skill.

node.description: Selected examples/architecture/reference/architecture-reference.input.json with services, API, database, requirement, test, and unreviewed inferred billing status API candidate; added CaseGraphen reference graph/projection fixtures under examples/architecture/reference/.
node.title: Reference fixture selected

node.description: Ran architecture input lift on the selected fixture and the direct-db-access smoke workflow. Evidence files: examples/architecture/reference/reports/architecture-input-lift.report.json and examples/architecture/reference/reports/architecture-direct-db-access-smoke.report.json. The reports demonstrate input lifting, interpretation-backed accepted facts, invariant violation, obstruction, unreviewed completion candidate, and human/AI/audit projections.
node.title: Reference pipeline reports generated

node.description: Ran highergraphen completion review accept against the smoke report for candidate:billing-status-api with reviewer:architecture-lead and a fixed reviewed_at timestamp. Evidence file: examples/architecture/reference/reports/completion-review-accepted.report.json.
node.title: Completion candidate explicitly accepted

node.description: Generated deterministic report artifacts under examples/architecture/reference/reports/: architecture-input-lift, architecture-direct-db-access-smoke, completion-review-accepted, casegraphen-validate, casegraphen-coverage, and casegraphen-project. Runtime reports include human_review, ai_view, audit_trace, source_ids, and information_loss projections.
node.title: Reference report artifacts generated

node.description: Documented exact CLI commands, report paths, and review-safety rules in examples/architecture/reference/README.md; linked the reference from docs/product-packages/architecture-product.md.
node.title: Reference workflow documented

node.description: Verified the reference covers input lift, interpretation package reuse, invariant violation, obstruction, completion candidate, explicit review action, projections, reports, CaseGraphen validation/projection, and static/workspace checks. Commands passed: cargo test -p higher-graphen-architecture-smoke --test reference_workflow; python3 scripts/validate-cli-report-contract.py; sh scripts/static-analysis.sh; cargo test --workspace; git diff --check.
node.title: Reference scope completeness verified

node.description: After adding the aggregate end-to-end CaseGraphen case, regenerated examples/architecture/reference/reports/casegraphen-coverage.report.json with coverage_status=covered and re-ran cargo test --workspace, python3 scripts/validate-cli-report-contract.py, sh scripts/static-analysis.sh, and git diff --check successfully.
node.title: CaseGraphen reference coverage covered
